text: I feel a curious sense of transition. The first image places me outside a glass-walled room—bright, minimalist, somewhat impersonal—which invokes a feeling of cool anticipation, as though I stand on the threshold of entering something unknown. The second image, filled with bold colors, creative displays, and evocative words, feels vibrant and intellectually stimulating. Here, there is an invitation to engage: with ideas, with history, with imagination. I am aware of my movement through these differing spaces—as if passing from mere possibility into the active heart of creation and inquiry.
